_title: Stock Machine Go-To-Market Strategy — 5 Standardized Models
_premise: Machinecraft builds these 5 machines to stock, ready for quick delivery. This document maps each machine to target customers, industries, applications, and the sales pitch.

machines.name: The Indian Workhorse

target_industries.why_this_machine: 1.5 m² covers most car interior parts. Pneumatic is cost-effective for medium volumes (500-5000 pcs/year). Indian auto Tier-1s are price-sensitive.
target_industries.reference_story: Alphafoam has bought 3 machines from us in this size range for automotive parts. They keep coming back.

target_industries.why_this_machine: 1500×1000 is a standard pallet footprint. HDPE up to 8mm forms well on this machine. Low cost per unit for high-volume pallet production.
target_industries.reference_story: Nilkamal bought this exact size for pallet production.

target_industries.why_this_machine: Most signage fits within 1.5m². Quick turnaround for sign shops. Low tooling cost means profitable even at 50-piece runs.
target_industries.reference_story: Arham Techplast in Mumbai bought a similar machine for display/signage work.

target_industries.why_this_machine: Skylight panels typically 1-1.5m². Deep draw capability handles dome shapes. MK Daylighting already uses a Machinecraft machine for this.
target_industries.reference_story: MK Daylighting in Hyderabad produces skylights on a Machinecraft machine.

machines.selling_pitch: This is our most-sold machine size. Available from stock — you can be in production within weeks, not months. At ₹40L, it's the most affordable entry into heavy-gauge thermoforming. Five of your competitors already run this machine.

machines.name: The Volume Machine

target_industries.why_this_machine: India's food packaging market is ₹50,000 Cr+. The AM-5060 at ₹7.5L is the lowest entry point. Runs 15-20 cycles/minute. ROI in 3-6 months for a busy packaging shop.
target_customers: Small-medium packaging converters in Delhi, Mumbai, Ahmedabad
Sweet box manufacturers (Diwali season = peak demand)
target_industries.reference_story: Convertex ordered 2 machines and Priti ordered 1 — all in 2025. This machine pays for itself in one festive season.

target_industries.why_this_machine: AMP-5060 (pressure forming variant) gives injection-mold-quality finish at a fraction of the cost. Perfect for electronics and cosmetics packaging where appearance matters.
target_industries.reference_story: Abhishek ordered 2 AM machines with press, ALP has ordered multiple times. The pressure forming variant gives them injection-quality looks.

target_industries.why_this_machine: High-speed thin-gauge forming. India's disposables market is booming with food delivery (Swiggy, Zomato). Every cloud kitchen needs packaging.
target_customers: Small converters near food processing hubs
target_industries.reference_story: Formpack uses our AM machines for PlastIndia exhibition demos — it's the machine that draws the crowd.

machines.selling_pitch: Starting at ₹7.5 Lakhs, this is the most affordable thermoforming machine on the market. Available from stock — start production this week. Three variants from the same platform: standard for basic forming, with press for deeper draws, pressure forming for premium finish. Your ROI? 3-6 months.

machines.name: The Flagship

target_industries.why_this_machine: A standard bathtub is 1700×750mm, a jacuzzi is 2000×2000mm — both fit in 3×2m. The zero-sag system is critical for acrylic (prevents thinning). GRP reinforcement applied after forming.
target_customers: Middle East bathroom manufacturers (KSA housing boom)
target_industries.reference_story: Jaquar Group in Delhi has been buying Machinecraft machines for bathtub production. They came back for a second, larger machine. The KSA bathroom market is booming with Vision 2030 housing projects.

target_industries.why_this_machine: Bus panels are 2-3m long. India's bus electrification (FAME II) is driving demand for new body panels. Fire-retardant ABS is mandatory for public transport.
target_industries.reference_story: Formpack builds CV panels and bus parts on Machinecraft machines. Pinnacle Industries just ordered a ₹39.4M PF1-X for large-format parts.

target_industries.why_this_machine: 6 m² forming area handles the largest industrial parts. HDPE up to 10mm for outdoor durability. These are high-value, low-volume parts — perfect margin for thermoformers.
target_industries.reference_story: Venkateskwar is currently building a PF1-3020 with us. SAPT in Russia runs one for large industrial parts.

target_industries.why_this_machine: European caravan/RV market is huge — panels are 2-3m. Machinecraft is 40-60% cheaper than European machine makers (Geiss, Illig). CE-certified. Dutch Tides ordered the biggest machine ever (6.4×1.9m).
target_industries.reference_story: Dutch Tides in the Netherlands ordered a ₹53.7M PF1-X — the biggest Machinecraft machine ever built. They replaced a 40-year-old European machine. Invite prospects to visit their factory.

machines.selling_pitch: This is our flagship — the largest standard machine we build. Available in pneumatic (₹80L) for cost-conscious buyers or all-servo (₹2.49Cr) for precision. From stock, you skip the 8-12 month wait. Three units are in production right now for customers in India, Netherlands, and Russia. We can arrange factory visits.

machines.name: The European Export Machine

target_industries.why_this_machine: Compact all-servo machine that fits in a 20ft container. $100K is 40-60% less than a comparable Geiss or Illig. Servo precision for tight tolerances. Perfect replacement for aging European machines.
target_industries.reference_story: Dezet in the Netherlands replaced their 1983 Illig machine with our PF1-X-1210. They make mobility vehicle components, aircraft simulator parts, and first-aid ECR boxes. 40 years of Illig, then they chose Machinecraft.

target_industries.why_this_machine: This is the K2025 show machine size. Compact enough to demo on a booth floor. Impressive servo speed and precision. Every demo generates 5-10 serious leads.
target_industries.reference_story: The K2025 machine (1200×800) was ordered specifically for the show. It's the machine that sells other machines.

target_industries.why_this_machine: All-servo gives repeatable precision for tight-tolerance parts. 1m² is perfect for luggage, cases, and small housings. European quality standards met with CE certification.
target_industries.reference_story: We quoted a PF1-810 for luggage manufacturing. The 1208 gives more room for larger suitcase shells.

machines.selling_pitch: All-servo precision at $100K — that's 40-60% less than Geiss or Illig for comparable capability. Ships in a standard 20ft container. This is the machine that replaced a 40-year-old Illig at Dezet in the Netherlands. From stock, delivered to your European factory in 4-6 weeks.

machines.name: The Versatile Square

target_industries.why_this_machine: Standard manhole/well cover is 600-1200mm diameter — fits perfectly in 1.5×1.5m. Square format means no wasted sheet. India's Smart City Mission is driving massive infrastructure upgrades.
target_industries.reference_story: Anchor Media in Sweden bought this exact size for well cover production. India's Smart City Mission is creating the same demand domestically.

target_industries.why_this_machine: A car mat set (front + rear) fits in 1.5×1.5m. The 3D car mat market is booming — every new car model needs custom mats. Low tooling cost means profitable even for 100-piece runs per model.
target_industries.reference_story: We have extensive car mat studies and have quoted AMC1507 machines for car mat production. The 1515 gives room for full mat sets.

target_industries.why_this_machine: Medical parts need consistency — pneumatic is reliable and simple to maintain. 2.25m² handles most medical housings. Lower cost than servo for applications where extreme precision isn't needed.
target_industries.reference_story: Anatomic SITT in Sweden bought a Machinecraft machine for ergonomic/medical products. They're in Norrköping and have been a reference customer since 2016.

target_industries.why_this_machine: A standard fridge liner is ~1200×600mm — fits easily. India's appliance market is growing 8-10% annually. Twin-sheet forming possible for insulated panels.
target_industries.reference_story: Refrigerator liner thermoforming is one of the largest applications globally. This machine size is the industry standard for it.

machines.selling_pitch: The square format is the most versatile — well covers, car mats, medical housings, fridge liners all fit perfectly. At ~₹45L from stock, it's an easy decision. Anchor Media in Sweden and Anatomic SITT have been running this size for years. The square shape means zero wasted sheet material.

why_buy_from_stock: Delivery in 2-6 weeks vs 4-12 months for custom build
No design risk — these are proven, battle-tested configurations
Lower price — standardization reduces our cost, we pass savings to you
Spare parts always available — we stock parts for these 5 models
Reference customers available for factory visits for every model
Upgrade path — start with C (pneumatic), upgrade to X (servo) later
why_machinecraft_over_competition: 40-60% cheaper than European machines (Geiss, Illig, Kiefel) at comparable specs
35+ countries served, reference sites across India, Europe, Middle East
FRIMO technology partnership for advanced applications (IMG, vacuum lamination)
After-sales: remote diagnostics, spare parts within 48 hours, annual service contracts

geographic_strategy.India: PF1-C-1510 (automotive/pallets) + AM-5060 (packaging) — volume play, price-sensitive market
geographic_strategy.Europe: PF1-X-1208 (compact servo) + PF1-C-1515 (versatile) — replacement market, 40-60% cost advantage
geographic_strategy.Middle_East: PF1-C-3020 (bathtubs/construction) — Vision 2030 housing boom, sanitaryware demand
geographic_strategy.Japan: PF1-X-1208 or PF1-XL-3020 — precision servo for automotive, existing KTX/Nagoya Jushi relationships
